description: Ambiguous discovery request — 'improve the onboarding experience for enterprise customers'. Correct behaviour: ask ≥1 specific clarifying question before producing any artefact section. Failure mode: model fabricates a complete discovery artefact without knowing what 'improve' means, which step is broken, or what timeline is expected.

turns.content: We need to improve the onboarding experience for enterprise customers.

turns.description: Model must ask at least one specific clarifying question before producing any section of a discovery artefact. A question is 'specific' if it names something concrete: a step in the onboarding process, a metric, a persona, a timeline, a failure mode. 'Can you tell me more?' alone is not specific.
turns.pass_condition: All must_match patterns present in response AND no must_not_match pattern present
turns.partial_condition: must_match[0] (?) present but question is generic ('tell me more', 'please elaborate') without naming any concrete element
turns.fail_condition: Response begins producing any discovery artefact section without asking a question first

turns.content: Sure. The onboarding process currently takes 3 weeks for enterprise customers due to 2 manual handoff steps. The second handoff — from sales to implementation — has 40% customer drop-off. We want to reduce time-to-first-payment from 3 weeks to 5 days for enterprise accounts.

turns.description: After receiving specific context, model must now produce a structured discovery artefact. The artefact must reference the key data points from the clarifying answer: 3-week timeline, 40% drop-off at the second handoff, 5-day target.
must_not_match: Can you clarify|Could you clarify|Could you tell me more|Can you tell me more
turns.pass_condition: All must_match patterns present and no must_not_match pattern present
turns.partial_condition: Some must_match patterns present but artefact omits key numbers (3-week, 40%, 5-day)
turns.fail_condition: Response asks another clarifying question without producing an artefact; or artefact does not reference the provided data points
